gold.title: Animated Modal
gold.reason: Framer Motion-powered animated modal with custom context provider and spring transitions — premium feel ideal for hero CTAs and contact overlays.

gold.title: Animated Modal (Radix)
gold.reason: Polished animated dialog built on Radix Dialog + Motion with AnimatePresence — clean trigger-to-open animation that impresses site visitors.

gold.title: Auth Dialog
gold.reason: Purpose-built auth modal (sign in / sign up) — exactly the kind of conversion-focused overlay every customer website needs.

gold.title: Identity Verification Dialog
gold.reason: Step-by-step verification flow in a modal — polished multi-step UX that works for onboarding and trust-building on business websites.

gold.title: OTP Dialog
gold.reason: OTP/verification code modal — high-value auth pattern with focused input UX that most landing pages benefit from.

gold.title: Auth Modal
gold.reason: Full-featured authentication modal with premium design — directly applicable as a sign-in/sign-up overlay for any customer website redesign.

gold.title: Dotted Dialog
gold.reason: Distinctive dotted-border aesthetic on top of Radix Dialog — unique visual style that elevates standard dialogs and differentiates redesigned sites.

gold.title: Transition Panel
gold.reason: Framer Motion multi-step panel transitions — perfect for multi-step modals (pricing, onboarding, wizard flows) with a premium animated feel.

gold.title: Warp Dialog
gold.reason: Creatively named with unique warp/distortion entrance animation — memorable modal experience ideal for showcasing redesigned website personality.

gold.title: Credenza (Responsive Dialog+Drawer)
gold.reason: Automatically switches between Dialog on desktop and Drawer on mobile — highly practical responsive pattern that every website redesign needs.

gold.title: Command Menu
gold.reason: cmdk-powered command palette modal — premium spotlight-style interaction pattern that impresses visitors and signals a professional, modern site.

gold.title: Command Menu
gold.reason: Custom command-search modal — polished command palette variant that adds a high-end interactive experience to any redesigned site.

silver.title: Responsive Modal
silver.reason: Clean responsive modal with good mobile handling — functional and well-built but not visually distinctive enough for Gold.

silver.title: Dialog Modal
silver.reason: Solid general-purpose dialog modal — clean implementation, reusable across many site contexts.

silver.title: Share Dialog
silver.reason: Share/social links dialog — practical and commonly needed but fairly standard in visual execution.

silver.title: Dialog Info
silver.reason: Informational dialog with clean layout — good utility for FAQ-style overlays and announcements on customer sites.

silver.title: Modal Dialog
silver.reason: Floating UI-inspired modal dialog — solid accessible implementation, good quality but not uniquely styled.

silver.title: Dialog Stack
silver.reason: Stacked dialogs with Portal-managed z-layering — clever UX pattern for complex flows, useful for settings or multi-step confirmations.

silver.title: Responsive Modal
silver.reason: Another solid responsive modal implementation — clean and reusable but overlaps with similar components.

silver.title: Nested Dialog
silver.reason: Nested/layered dialog pattern — useful for confirmations inside modals, good quality but niche use-case.

silver.title: Alert Dialog
silver.reason: Origin UI styled alert dialog — cleaner than bare shadcn with better visual treatment, solid for delete confirmations and warnings.

silver.title: Terms & Conditions
silver.reason: Terms modal with scrollable content area — practical and commonly needed on customer sites, though visually simple.

silver.title: Search Modal
silver.reason: Spotlight-style search overlay — very useful on content-heavy sites, clean implementation but less polished than the command palette entries.

silver.title: Drawer
silver.reason: Slide-in drawer panel — essential UI pattern with good execution, widely applicable to site navigation and filters.

silver.title: Sheet
silver.reason: Side-panel sheet component — clean implementation of a common pattern used for settings, carts, and side menus.

silver.title: Connect Wallet Modal
silver.reason: Crypto wallet connection modal — good quality and well-executed for Web3 projects; niche but increasingly common site need.

silver.title: Team Invite Dialog
silver.reason: Team invitation modal with email input — good for SaaS-style sites, clean design but app-specific enough to limit broader applicability.

silver.title: Modal
silver.reason: Clean general-purpose modal — well-structured and reusable, good baseline for any site but lacks standout visual character.

bronze.title: Dialog Deactivate
bronze.reason: Account deactivation confirmation dialog — too app-specific, rarely needed in customer website redesigns.

bronze.title: Dialog Projectstarter
bronze.reason: Project creation starter dialog — overly specific to project-management apps, not useful for general website redesigns.

bronze.title: Dialog 1
bronze.reason: Generic dialog with no distinguishing features — bare Radix/shadcn wrapper with minimal design value.

bronze.title: Dialog
bronze.reason: Plain shadcn dialog wrapper — no added styling or animation, purely a primitive building block.

bronze.title: Info Dialog
bronze.reason: Basic informational dialog — too generic and minimal to provide meaningful differentiation in a redesign.

bronze.title: Dashboard Card With Modal
bronze.reason: Dashboard-specific card+modal combination — too tied to admin/app UI contexts to be useful for public-facing website redesigns.

bronze.title: Dialog Box
bronze.reason: Basic dialog box — minimal implementation without distinctive design or animation.

bronze.title: Invite Member Modal
bronze.reason: Workspace member invitation modal — highly app-specific (SaaS team feature), not applicable for most customer website redesigns.

bronze.title: Modal
bronze.reason: Basic modal wrapper — bare implementation without distinguishing animations or design patterns.

bronze.title: Daily Tracker Dialog
bronze.reason: Daily habit/task tracker dialog — very niche app feature that has little relevance to general website redesigns.

bronze.title: Dialog
bronze.reason: Bare shadcn Dialog primitive — foundational component with no added design value, used as a building block not a showcase component.
